div1.entryFree: Vouch, subst. testimony, attestation: my v. against you, Meas. II, 4, 156. and make my v. as strong as shore of rock, H8 I, 1, 157. to beg of Hob and Dick . . . their needless --es, Cor. II, 3, 124. one that in the authority of her merit did justly put on the v. of very malice itself, Oth. II, 1, 147.*
